title: Prysmian signs €5.5bn fibre deal with Molex to wire AI data centres
summary: Prysmian has signed a €5.5bn, 10-year agreement with Molex, the Koch Industries-owned connector and cable maker, to supply optical cable for use inside AI data centres. To get there, Prysmian is allocating €1.25bn of capacity investment through 2031.
caption: output/2026-07-20/prysmian-signs-5-5bn-fibre-deal-with-molex-to-wire-ai-data-centres.txt
